title: MetaAuditLog
description: Persistent log of meta-governance operations — metabuild, metafix, metasync, meta-recognition. Each log file records what the meta-tool did, whether it was correct, and a summary for D_c computation.

tool.description: Which meta-governance tool produced this log

entries.description: Ordered list of operations or detections produced by the tool

meta_audit_entry.description: One recorded operation or detection. Shape varies by tool — only timestamp and outcome are universal.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this entry was recorded

outcome.description: Whether the meta-tool action was correct. Used for accuracy tracking.

notes.description: Human-authored annotation — context, caveats, lessons learned

operation.description: metabuild/metafix/metasync: the specific operation performed (e.g. bootstrap_department, reference_fix, count_sync)

target.description: The artifact, file, or department this entry acted upon

artifacts_produced.description: metabuild: list of artifact filenames produced

schema_validation.description: metabuild: schema validation result for produced artifacts

fix.description: metafix: description of the fix applied

level.description: metafix: generalization level of the fix

recurrence_check.description: metafix: whether the same problem recurs elsewhere

signal.description: meta-recognition: the specific signal that triggered detection

confidence.description: meta-recognition: confidence in the detection (aligns with alignment-policy thresholds)

actioned.description: meta-recognition: whether the proposed action was actually executed

result.description: meta-recognition/metafix: outcome description after the action was taken

artifact.description: metasync: name of the artifact whose count or reference was synced

was.description: metasync: value before sync (number or string)

now.description: metasync: value after sync (number or string)

file.description: metasync: the file that was updated

meta_audit_summary.description: Aggregate metrics for this log file — used by D_c computation and governance reports

total_operations.description: Total number of entries in this log. metasync uses total_detections instead — both are accepted.

meta_Dc.description: Optional D_c assessment for this tool's compounding value this session

patterns_detected.description: meta-recognition: pattern types that were detected

patterns_not_yet_detected.description: meta-recognition: known pattern types with no detections yet — growth targets

trivial_drifts_fixed.description: metasync: number of count mismatches corrected

structural_flags.description: metasync: number of structural issues found (schema violations, missing files)

artifacts_checked.description: metasync: number of artifact categories checked in the scan

fixes.description: metasync: detailed list of changes applied
